'''Ghazdik Jah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was employed by [[Sebolto]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he, along with [[Mazanga]], was wanted by [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]] and [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] for the murder of special assistants to the [[Malastare/Legends|Malastarian]] Senators. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], worth 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]], was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
